description: Argued with husband/partner more than usual (12 mo before pregnancy)
Exercised 3+ days/week in 3 months before pregnancy
Took daily multivitamin in month before pregnancy
Had teeth cleaned by dentist before pregnancy
Got prenatal care as early as wanted (2000-2008)
Prenatal care began in first trimester (2009-2011)
Ever breastfed or pumped breast milk
Baby had checkup/exam within first week
